scope: Pixhawk actuator mapping and ArduPilot parameter export for sprayer bench/SITL validation
hardware_boundary: Pixhawk AUX outputs provide logic/PWM signals only; external driver boards must switch pump, valves, agitation, and cutoff loads.
Physical emergency stop must cut actuator power independent of Pixhawk software state.
Do not store farm coordinates, credentials, or private mission data in this mapping.

outputs.logic: 1000 us = OFF / minimum speed; 2000 us = maximum bench-rated speed
Normally closed valve; OFF during boot, transit, and fault states
Normally closed valve; OFF during boot, transit, and fault states
Agitation disabled by default; enabled only during explicit bench/SITL command windows

outputs.role: Emergency Stop Physical Cutoff Relay Monitor/Command
outputs.logic: Active-high closed/healthy command by default; physical E-stop remains hardwired and authoritative

forbidden: direct Pixhawk power drive for pump or solenoid loads
shared GPIO pin assignments across independent actuator roles
chemical/fertilizer testing before water-only bench acceptance passes
